component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.8.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to 3.x is required for compatibility with the target JDK.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 11 settings on a Java 21 toolchain or vice-versa causes version mismatches; explicit target is required for correct bytecode generation.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact coordinates from legacy groupId/artifactId to the new com.mysql/mysql-connector-j.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifactId mysql-connector-java is deprecated/removed in newer versions; the new artifactId is required for resolution in modern repositories.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x, causing compilation errors.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x, which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 API.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The class EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compilation error.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from chained DSL to lambda DSL to comply with Spring Security 6 changes.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The chained methods like .csrf().disable() and .authorizeRequests() are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The method antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compilation error.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors.
